  • model.DBImplementationAdministrator
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    final String
    SQL_CHECK_LOGIN
    "SELECT * FROM administrator WHERE name_admin = ? AND password_admin = ?"
    final String
    SQL_DELETE_ADMIN
    "DELETE FROM administrator WHERE name_admin = ?"
    final String
    SQL_GET_ADMIN_BY_NAME
    "SELECT * FROM administrator WHERE name_admin = ?"
    final String
    SQL_GET_ALL_ADMINS
    "SELECT * FROM administrator"
    final String
    SQL_INSERT_ADMIN
    "INSERT INTO administrator VALUES (?,?)"
    final String
    SQL_UPDATE_ADMIN_PASSWORD
    "UPDATE administrator SET password_admin = ? WHERE name_admin = ?"
  • model.DBImplementationBook
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    final String
    SQLDELETE
    "DELETE FROM book WHERE id_client = ? AND cod_cruise = ? AND startDate = ?"
    final String
    SQLSELECTALL
    "SELECT id_client, cod_cruise, originCity, destinationCity, startDate, endDate, basePrice, finalPrice, room_number FROM book"
  • model.DBImplementationClient
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    final String
    SQLDELETEBYCODE
    "DELETE FROM client WHERE id_client = ?"
    final String
    SQLINSERT
    "INSERT INTO client VALUES(?,?,?,?,?,?)"
    final String
    SQLSELECTALL
    "SELECT * FROM client"
    final String
    SQLSELECTBOOKCLIENT
    "SELECT * FROM book WHERE id_client=?"
    final String
    SQLSELECTBYCODE
    "SELECT * FROM client WHERE id_client = ?"
    final String
    SQLUPDATEBYCODE
    "UPDATE client SET name_client=?, surname_client=?, age_client=?, phone_client=?, email_client=? WHERE id_client=?"
  • model.DBImplementationCruise
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    final String
    SQLDELETEBYCODE
    "DELETE FROM cruise WHERE cod_cruise = ?"
    final String
    SQLINSERT
    "INSERT INTO cruise(name_cruise, type_cruise, num_rooms, capacity_max) VALUES(?,?,?,?)"
    final String
    SQLNEXTCODE
    "SELECT MAX(cod_cruise)+1 FROM cruise"
    final String
    SQLSELECTALL
    "SELECT * FROM cruise"
    final String
    SQLSELECTBOOKBYCREUISE
    "SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE cod_cruise=?"
    final String
    SQLSELECTBYCODE
    "SELECT * FROM cruise WHERE cod_cruise=?"
    final String
    SQLSELECTWORKERBYCRUISE
    "SELECT * FROM WORKER WHERE cod_cruise=?"
    final String
    SQLUPDATEBYCODE
    "UPDATE cruise set type_cruise=?,name_cruise=?, num_rooms=?,capacity_max=? WHERE cod_cruise=?"
  • model.DBImplementationWorker
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    final String
    SQLDELETEBYCODE
    "DELETE FROM worker WHERE id_worker = ?"
    final String
    SQLEMAIL
    "SELECT * FROM worker WHERE email=?"
    final String
    SQLID
    "SELECT * FROM worker WHERE id_worker=?"
    final String
    SQLINSERT
    "INSERT INTO worker VALUES(?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)"
    final String
    SQLPHONE
    "SELECT * FROM worker WHERE phone_number=?"
    final String
    SQLSELECTALL
    "SELECT w.id_worker, w.service, w.name_worker, w.surname_worker, w.hiring_date, w.phone_number, w.email, w.age, w.spanish_language, w.english_language, w.cod_cruise, c.name_cruise, c.type_cruise, c.num_rooms, c.capacity_max FROM worker w JOIN cruise c ON w.cod_cruise=c.cod_cruise"
    final String
    SQLUPDATEBYCODE
    "UPDATE worker SET service = ?, name_worker = ?, surname_worker = ?, hiring_date = ?, phone_number = ?, email = ?, age = ?, spanish_language = ?, english_language = ?, cod_cruise = ? WHERE id_worker = ?"
